input_text:
SECTION_TITLE: Definition: Digital Solution
CONTENT:
In alignment with the Scaled Agile Framework (SAFe) and extended by Porsche-specific terminology, a Digital Solution is defined as follows: A Digital Solution is a cohesive construct that delivers business value by integrating multiple IT Products. These IT Products are modular, technically and logically bounded units that implement specific business functionalities. Together, they form the technical foundation of a Digital Solution. In addition to IT Products, a Digital Solution may also include: • Business processes • Methods and practices • Organizational structures

schema_definition.definedBy: The subject entity is defined or described by the concept, framework, or entity specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.extendedBy: The subject entity is expanded, supplemented, or further specified by the entity given as the object.
schema_definition.isA: The subject entity is a type or instance of the category or class specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.delivers: The subject entity provides or produces the outcome, value, or benefit specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.integrates: The subject entity combines or brings together the entities specified by the object entity into a unified whole.
schema_definition.are: The subject entity possesses the characteristics or qualities described by the object entity.
schema_definition.implement: The subject entity carries out, executes, or realizes the function, process, or feature specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.form: The subject entity constitutes or makes up the entity specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.mayInclude: The subject entity can optionally contain, comprise, or encompass the entities specified by the object entity.

CONTENT:
In addition to IT Products, a Digital Solution may also include: • Business processes • Methods and practices • Organizational structures

input_text:
SECTION_TITLE: Characteristics of a Digital Solution
CONTENT:
• Consists of IT Products Each IT Product is an application, business service, or business platform, including its associated technologies. These are delivered to internal users (employees) and/or external users (customers).
• Supports Business Capabilities IT Products enable business capabilities, processes, and data entities.
• Enables Operational Value Streams (OVS) Digital Solutions are designed to support and enhance OVS by delivering measurable business value.
• Is Developed Within a Single Agile Release Train (ART) Each Digital Solution is budgeted and managed within one portfolio and is developed by one or more agile teams within a single ART.
• Is Part of a Development Value Stream (DVS) The contributing teams are part of a DVS and are responsible for defining, building, validating, and releasing the IT Products that make up the Digital Solution.
• Supports Independent Delivery IT Products within a Digital Solution are potentially independently deployable and operable, ensuring resilience, scalability, and speed.

schema_definition.deliveredTo: The subject entity is provided or made available to the recipient entity specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.includes: The subject entity contains or comprises the components or elements specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.partOf: The subject entity belongs to or is a component of the larger entity specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.type: The subject entity is classified as or belongs to the category or kind specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.designedTo: The subject entity is created or intended to perform the function or purpose specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.developedWithin: The subject entity is created, built, or produced inside the organizational or structural context specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.enables: The subject entity makes possible or facilitates the function, capability, or process specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.delivers: The subject entity provides or produces the outcome, value, or result specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.responsibleFor: The subject entity has the duty or obligation to carry out the activity or task specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.potentially: The subject entity has the capacity or possibility to exhibit or perform the characteristic or action specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.ensure: The subject entity guarantees or makes certain the presence, quality, or occurrence of the attribute or condition specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.consistsOf: The subject entity is composed of or made up of the parts or elements specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.budgetedAndManagedWithin: The subject entity is financially planned and administratively controlled inside the scope or boundary specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.makeUp: The subject entities collectively form or constitute the whole specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.developedBy: The subject entity is created, built, or produced by the agent or group specified by the object entity.

input_text:
SECTION_TITLE: Purpose and Benefits
CONTENT:
[
{"section": "Definition", "element": "Digital Solution", "description": "Aconstruct composed of IT Products and potentially processes, methods, and organizational elements"},
{"section": "Definition", "element": "IT Product", "description": "Application, service, or platform with supporting technologies"},
{"section": "Composition", "element": "Modular Structure", "description": "Multiple IT Products form a Digital Solution"},
{"section": "Composition", "element": "Logical Boundaries", "description": "Each IT Product is technically and logically self- contained"},
{"section": "Functionality", "element": "Business Enablement", "description": "Supports business capabilities, processes, and data entities"},
{"section": "Functionality", "element": "Value Stream Alignment", "description": "Supports Operational Value Streams (OVS)"},
{"section": "Development Context", "element": "Agile Release Train (ART)", "description": "Each Digital Solution is developed within a single ART"},
{"section": "Development Context", "element": "Development Value Stream (DVS)", "description": "Teams within the DVS define, build, validate, and release IT Products"},
{"section": "Development Context", "element": "Portfolio Alignment", "description": "Budgeted and governed within one portfolio"},
{"section": "Delivery Model", "element": "Independent Deployability", "description": "IT Products can be released and operated independently"},
{"section": "Delivery Model", "element": "Resilience & Speed", "description": "Ensures scalable, stable, and fast delivery"},
{"section": "Customer Value", "element": "Outcome-Oriented", "description": "Customers seek complete solutions, not isolated features"},
{"section": "Customer Value", "element": "Internal & External Users", "description": "Solutions serve both internal employees and external customers"}
]

schema_definition.canBeReleased: The subject entity has the capability to be released independently or separately as specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.release: The subject entity causes or performs the action of releasing the object entity.
schema_definition.supports: The subject entity provides assistance, enables, or facilitates the function or existence of the object entity.
schema_definition.governedWithin: The subject entity is managed, controlled, or regulated within the scope or boundaries of the object entity.
schema_definition.forms: The subject entity constitutes or creates the object entity as a whole or part of its structure.
schema_definition.developedWithin: The subject entity is created, built, or developed inside or as part of the environment or context specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.serve: The subject entity provides service, assistance, or utility to the object entity.
schema_definition.define: The subject entity specifies, determines, or establishes the characteristics or parameters of the object entity.
schema_definition.customersDoNotSeek: The subject entity is something that customers intentionally avoid or do not desire, as indicated by the object entity.
schema_definition.type: The subject entity belongs to or is classified under the category or kind specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.description: The subject entity is characterized or explained by the information provided in the object entity.
schema_definition.hasSupportingTechnologies: The subject entity includes or is accompanied by the supporting technologies indicated by the object entity.
schema_definition.canBeOperated: The subject entity has the capability to be operated or function independently as specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.customersSeek: The subject entity is something that customers intentionally desire or look for, as indicated by the object entity.
schema_definition.hasProperty: The subject entity possesses or exhibits the attribute or characteristic specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.composedOf: The subject entity consists of or is made up of the components or elements specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.validate: The subject entity performs the action of checking, confirming, or verifying the correctness or quality of the object entity.
schema_definition.ensures: The subject entity guarantees or makes certain the occurrence or presence of the object entity.
schema_definition.budgetedWithin: The subject entity has its budget allocated or planned within the limits or scope of the object entity.
schema_definition.within: The subject entity exists inside or is contained by the object entity.
schema_definition.build: The subject entity performs the action of constructing, creating, or assembling the object entity.

input_text:
SECTION_TITLE: Purpose and Benefits
CONTENT:
• A Digital Solution delivers end-to-end value to internal or external customers.
• Customers do not purchase isolated features or capabilities—they seek complete solutions that fulfill their desired outcomes.
• Digital Solutions enable organizations to align technical delivery with business strategy and customer needs.

schema_definition.enable: The subject entity makes it possible or facilitates the object entity to perform an action or achieve a state.
schema_definition.fulfill: The subject entity satisfies, meets, or accomplishes the requirements or conditions specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.to: The subject entity is directed toward, intended for, or benefits the object entity.
schema_definition.delivers: The subject entity provides, supplies, or produces the object entity.
schema_definition.do_not_purchase: The subject entity refrains from buying or acquiring the object entity.
schema_definition.align: The subject entity brings into agreement, coordination, or proper relation with the object entity.
schema_definition.seek: The subject entity actively looks for, desires, or aims to obtain the object entity.

schema_definition.role: The subject entity has the role or function specified by the object entity.

input_text:
SECTION_TITLE: Responsible / Subscriptions
CONTENT:
Each Digital Solution Fact Sheet requires a person in the subscriptions who is responsible for the content and quality of the data. The assignment of type, person and role is done via the subscriptions in the respective fact sheet

schema_definition.doneVia: The subject entity is carried out, completed, or performed through the means or method specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.responsibleFor: The subject entity has responsibility or accountability for the object entity.
schema_definition.hasAttributes: The subject entity possesses or is characterized by the attributes specified by the object entity.
schema_definition.requires: The subject entity needs or necessitates the object entity in order to function or be complete.
schema_definition.partOf: The subject entity is a component or constituent of the object entity.
